'''shoparaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atelectatic|atelectatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atelectatic|atelectatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shoparaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoparithi|shoparithi]] || [[word:shopariji|shopariji]] || [[word:shoparishi|shoparishi]] || [[word:shopariki|shopariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoparuthuthu|shoparuthuthu]] || [[word:shoparujuju|shoparujuju]] || [[word:shoparushushu|shoparushushu]] || [[word:shoparukuku|shoparukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoparuthu|shoparuthu]] || [[word:shoparuju|shoparuju]] || [[word:shoparushu|shoparushu]] || [[word:shoparuku|shoparuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoparufthuf|shoparufthuf]] || [[word:shoparufjuf|shoparufjuf]] || [[word:shoparufshuf|shoparufshuf]] || [[word:shoparufkuf|shoparufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoparethe|shoparethe]] || [[word:shopareje|shopareje]] || [[word:shopareshe|shopareshe]] || [[word:shopareke|shopareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoparothotho|shoparothotho]] || [[word:shoparojojo|shoparojojo]] || [[word:shoparoshosho|shoparoshosho]] || [[word:shoparokoko|shoparokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoparotho|shoparotho]] || [[word:shoparojo|shoparojo]] || [[word:shoparosho|shoparosho]] || [[word:shoparoko|shoparoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoparofthof|shoparofthof]] || [[word:shoparofjof|shoparofjof]] || [[word:shoparofshof|shoparofshof]] || [[word:shoparofkof|shoparofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfthĂŻf|shoparĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfjĂŻf|shoparĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfshĂŻf|shoparĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfkĂŻf|shoparĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shoparĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shoparĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shoparĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shoparĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfthĂŻf|shoparĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfjĂŻf|shoparĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfshĂŻf|shoparĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfkĂŻf|shoparĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfthĂŻf|shoparĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfjĂŻf|shoparĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfshĂŻf|shoparĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shoparĂŻfkĂŻf|shoparĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shoparĂŠthĂŠ|shoparĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shoparĂŠjĂŠ|shoparĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shoparĂŠshĂŠ|shoparĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shoparĂŠkĂŠ|shoparĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shoparathatha|shoparathatha]] || [[word:shoparajaja|shoparajaja]] || [[word:shoparashasha|shoparashasha]] || [[word:shoparakaka|shoparakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shoparatha|shoparatha]] || [[word:shoparaja|shoparaja]] || [[word:shoparasha|shoparasha]] || [[word:shoparaka|shoparaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shoparafthaf|shoparafthaf]] || [[word:shoparafjaf|shoparafjaf]] || [[word:shoparafshaf|shoparafshaf]] || [[word:shoparafkaf|shoparafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shoparasha|shoparasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shoparshĂ«asha|shoparshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shoparroasha|shoparroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shoparmuasha|shoparmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shoparyaasha|shoparyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshoparnkshĂ«asha|goshoparnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshoparnkroasha|goshoparnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshoparnkmuasha|goshoparnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshoparnkyaasha|goshoparnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shopaparasha|shopaparasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopaparshĂ«asha|shopaparshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopaparroasha|shopaparroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopaparmuasha|shopaparmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopaparyaasha|shopaparyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopaparnkshĂ«asha|goshopaparnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopaparnkroasha|goshopaparnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopaparnkmuasha|goshopaparnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopaparnkyaasha|goshopaparnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shepĂŠrasha|shepĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shepĂŠrshĂ«asha|shepĂŠrshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shepĂŠrroasha|shepĂŠrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shepĂŠrmuasha|shepĂŠrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shepĂŠryaasha|shepĂŠryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshepĂŠrnkshĂ«asha|goshepĂŠrnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshepĂŠrnkroasha|goshepĂŠrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshepĂŠrnkmuasha|goshepĂŠrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshepĂŠrnkyaasha|goshepĂŠrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shopfarasha|shopfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopfarshĂ«asha|shopfarshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopfarroasha|shopfarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopfarmuasha|shopfarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopfaryaasha|shopfaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopfarnkshĂ«asha|goshopfarnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopfarnkroasha|goshopfarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopfarnkmuasha|goshopfarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopfarnkyaasha|goshopfarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
